reviewers.summary: Verified delivery result recordId is required and projection dedupe identity no longer relies on generatedAt.
No security findings for descriptor, endpoint, command, URL, path, future sink, delivery result, or product mutation boundary language.

prior_findings_resolved: Changed SinkDeliveryResult.recordId from optional to required.
Defined recordId as stable semantic identity rather than sink-local receipt identity.
Clarified projection dedupe identity and excluded generatedAt as a dedupe key.
